programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Welcome to the Family
programme.desc: The staff at the Columbus Zoo can hardly contain themselves as they prepare to make a home for an orphaned baby gorilla.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cow I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: It's spring, and there's no shortage of mama drama at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Game of Goats
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, so it's birthing season at Pol Veterinary Services!

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Another One Fights the Doc
programme.desc: Not even a kick to the head keeps Dr. Pol from coming to the rescue of his clients.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Of Mice and Macaws
programme.desc: New doc Nicole Arcy learns from the pros at PVS and treating all kinds of animals.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Mexico's Ruins
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the strange truth inside the mysterious ancient marvels of Mexico's long-lost civilizations, and using the latest science methods, experts uncover the location of the lost treasures that are rumored to be inside.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for the Templars' Treasure
programme.desc: The lost treasure of the Knights Templar is one of history's greatest mysteries, and new discoveries might finally reveal its whereabouts.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for the Templars' Treasure
programme.desc: The lost treasure of the Knights Templar is one of history's greatest mysteries, and new discoveries might finally reveal its whereabouts.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Jungle Treasure
programme.desc: The discovery of strange giant stone heads in the Mexican jungle leads archaeologists to the lost capital city of the Olmec, and new investigations reveal evidence that the secret knowledge of these mysterious people changed life in the Americas forever.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Stirring Up the Dead
programme.desc: The owner of a restaurant and bar, undergoing renovations, calls CPD for help when paranormal activity starts to scare away employees and brings construction to a halt.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.desc: An affair between a doctor and his nurse leads to the deaths of himself and his wife.

programme.title: American Justice: Free to Murder Again

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Ready for Anything
programme.desc: In Baton Rouge, Lacey and Stacey restrain a patient suffering from violent hallucinations after overdosing on the synthetic drug Mojo. Meanwhile, an Austin man calls 911 to save his wife from cardiac arrest and in Yonkers, a woman is unresponsive.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Police officers Robb and Bethany find themselves in an armed standoff with a suspect who has holed up in an apartment complex. Meanwhile, Fire Rescue team Mayville and Stokes must put out a trailer fire that threatens to incinerate the rest of the park.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A woman scared to death by a stalker is relieved when he disappears for a few years--only to make a terrifying return.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery. The cops search for the person who set fire to this loving mother of three.

programme.title: Body Cam: Long Shot
programme.desc: An Arizona mother triggers a desperate search for her son, who is armed and suicidal. An Ohio officer fights for his life when a suspect overpowers him. When a Wisconsin man shoots his co-workers police must find him to stop the threat.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted
programme.desc: In Texas police set a trap for a would-be killer. Officers put a plan into action, and Body Cam reveals a deadly plot. In Florida, a high-speed chase leads police into a dangerous swamp. But when a K9 locates the suspect, the arrest turns into a rescue.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: When Marlys Sather doesn't return to work after a lunch appointment, her family makes a horrifying discovery. The cops search for the person who set fire to this loving mother of three.

programme.title: Body Cam: Long Shot
programme.desc: An Arizona mother triggers a desperate search for her son, who is armed and suicidal. An Ohio officer fights for his life when a suspect overpowers him. When a Wisconsin man shoots his co-workers police must find him to stop the threat.

programme.title: Body Cam: Hunted

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: Dr. Margo Prade is shot to death in the parking lot of her own medical practice in Akron, Ohio, and the senseless act shocks the city. Police are baffled. Until they discover that Margo's phone calls were being secretly recorded.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Jimmy McClain, a beloved basketball coach and teacher, is found brutally murdered in his own home. With no forced entry, police fear Jimmy knew his killer or let the killer inside his house.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell Hounds
programme.desc: A woman in Dayton, Ohio welcomes a young family when they move into the long derelict house next door. But escalating fights over everything from treatment of pets to treatment of children leads to a violent, bloody, and deadly confrontation.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Road to Redemption
programme.desc: For more than two decades, a woman struggled to understand why her sister and brother-in-law were murdered by an intruder. Today, she is trying to heal by meeting the shooter face-to-face to get those answers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A mother of two claims she saw the murder of a friend in her dreams. In fact the dream was a reality and her friend was later found bludgeoned to death in Central Florida.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: A bright college student is lured into the world of bondage and domination by a friend but when she said no she didn't survive the night.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Murder on the Rocks
programme.desc: After ranchers spot the body of a teen girl brutally beaten on a riverbank, deputies conduct countless interviews to no avail. Years pass until cutting-edge technology helps police lift DNA from the murder weapon and zero in on an enraged killer.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Bridge of Betrayal
programme.desc: A car fire blazing near a beach sends detectives on a search that ends with a young woman found dead and her mother yearning for answers. The killer's attempt to eliminate evidence actually gives investigators the clues they need to catch him.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Anatomy of Murder
programme.desc: When a beloved single dad is found dead in his burning home, an autopsy reveals the fire didn't kill the man he was murdered. Investigators must decode ballistic, chemical, and digital clues to reveal a complex plan by a twisted killer.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Vaughan Furniture Company
programme.desc: Mike and Ted struggle to salvage a heavy furniture press while Robert is slowed down by explosion-proof lights. Mike and Grayson build a chair with pieces from an old suitcase and Robert discovers a vintage TV and radio.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Agatha's Catholic Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to snowy Ellwood City, Pennsylvania, to reclaim pieces of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. In the bitterly cold weather, they salvage stained glass, spiral ducting and lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Beechcraft Airplane Salvage
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs try something a little different by bidding on a 1947 Beechcraft airplane. Mike goes a little over budget to win the auction and the crew has to hire professionals to figure out how to disassemble it properly.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former First National Bank
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, NC. Key items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. At the shop, Robert builds a bar out of a boat salvaged from Smith Mountain Lake.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cast Iron Storefront
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage a cast iron storefront in Vicksburg, MS. Mike and Tay also work together to build a custom table for country music duo Thompson Square.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Waterside Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny build a Moroccan-style yurt for client Maisa who wants an affordable place that's all her own on her family's waterfront property.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Race Is On: The Builders Set Their Course
programme.desc: Three men set out to build three cabins in remote areas of the Alaskan Frontier. They will make preparations in the harsh Alaskan winter and race against time, the bitter cold, and the wilderness to complete their builds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grip It and Rip It
programme.desc: As the summer season starts to thaw out in Alaska, the builders get underway. The Alaskan elements are stubborn at all three build sites, but a little ingenuity goes a long way.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Chicken or Bust
programme.desc: Lee Raymond is struggling to get back on track after losing a month to bad weather. Meanwhile, Chuck had has perfect weather, but most of his labor is due to leave in less than a month so he's got to move hard and fast.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Ryan's Song
programme.desc: Jim Wagner and his family begin the long process of starting over; building roads, levelling ground, and trying to get their cabin back up. Meanwhile, Chuck's right-hand man, Ryan Beachy, has been tragically killed in a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Long Hard Slog
programme.desc: After battling the tragedy of the loss of his right-hand man, Ryan Beachy, Chuck Gerwig is back in the saddle and ready to finish the job that he and Ryan started months earlier.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Tempers Flare
programme.desc: Winter is fast approaching and now all three of the builders are finding themselves with less help to finish the massive tasks at hand.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Downward Slide
programme.desc: As the days get shorter and colder, and snow is visible on the highest peaks, the builders frantically race to get their homes sealed in.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The End Game
programme.desc: Winter has arrived and the race is over. It's time for each of our builders to come to terms with their end games as they pack up and head home for the season. To say this year has been a challenge would be an understatement.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Fixins
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Florida fanning the flames for something savory and something sweet. Roger heads to Hamaknockers Bar-B-Que in Crawfordville, where a young pitmaster pulls pork with a power tool!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in pig paradise, cooking up two whole hogs in two different styles.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swords and Spits
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking visits chefs using unusual tools over live fires. In Georgia, Roger meets Erik Niel, a chef that loves to break out of his butcher shop to cook outdoors.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking joins chefs in their own kitchens as they honour the traditions of comforting and flavorful soul food dishes. From ribs, catfish and barbecue to oxtail, pork chops and cornbread.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches

programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN

programme.title: Cake Hunters: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Sisters Treava and Raya rarely agree on much, but they both know that their 25th annual family reunion has got to be the greatest the Hopkins family has ever seen, but they can't agree on the perfect cake for the occasion.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Katie and Jason are not only expecting identical twins, but also dozens of friends and family to celebrate with them at their baby gender reveal party.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Brothers Sumit and Swithin are both recently engaged, so their mother Rani is throwing a dual traditional Indian engagement party with over 300 guests. Mom has her heart set on a traditional Indian show-stopper cake, but the brothers, not so much.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Flower Power
programme.desc: Vanessa and Tim are trying to find a cake that suits both their tastes. Vanessa wants a garden-themed, Savannah-inspired showpiece, while Tim wants something that tells the story of their romance without femininity.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Mint For Each Other
programme.desc: With only two weeks until their wedding, Pat and Alli are looking for the perfect cake that pays tribute to his time in the armed services and plays to her love of classic, rustic elegance.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Not Fond of Fondant
programme.desc: Soon-to-be-married Josh and Jessalyn have planned everything for their French-themed wedding, with one big exception. They haven't been able to agree on the perfect cake design to represent them both.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Dazzling Dragon and Bear Cakes
programme.desc: A music festival calls for a totally awesome cake that's ready to drop some beats, and then a baker draws inspiration from fashion designers for a dazzling metallic stunner.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Magical Character Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fancy Flower and Farm Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Flying and Golden Cakes

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center

programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout
programme.desc: After crashing Ma Beagle’s birthday party, Webby and a new mysterious friend must get back home.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Clash of the Cranky Chefs
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Not the Mama
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Globby Within
programme.desc: Nega-Globby begins to take control of Globby’s body in order to cause chaos around the city turning Globby from adored hero to a wanted criminal overnight!

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Top Wing/ Fried Mean Tomatoes
programme.desc: Mavis and Quasimodo host some cooking classes at the hotel, but things don't go quiet as planned. Wendy wants to join the aerial security team, the Night Warts, but tensions arise when Mavis makes the team instead.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Stepmonsters/ Better Know Your Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives

programme.desc: Spider-Man faces off against his most bizarre bad guy yet, Jack O' Lantern. Then he turns Prowler, a reluctant villain, to the side of heroes when he helps him save his brother.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy

programme.desc: When a former Marine is suspected of making a chemical bomb, the team works with the FBI's domestic terrorist task force including Operational Psychologist Nate Getz.

programme.title: NCIS: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When the dead body of arms dealer La Grenouille surfaces, the NCIS team is put under investigation for his murder by the FBI and Jenny Shepard becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rockabye
programme.desc: When a pregnant runaway is badly beaten, detectives focus on the father of the baby. However, when the case goes to trial, the credibility of the abortion clinic they visited is questioned and the focus shifts to the doctor at the clinic.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Alien
programme.desc: When an injured 12-year-old boy is dumped outside a hospital, detectives are led to Charlie Monaghan, a teenage girl who was seen beating the boy a week earlier. The girl's legal woes are revealed when questions of guardianship and consent are discovered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Blast
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl is kidnapped and DNA tests on the blood found in the abductor's abandoned van reveal she has leukemia. While delivering the news to the girl's family, Medical Examiner Warner is drawn into the abductor's game.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Taboo
programme.desc: When a newborn baby is found in a trash bin, Detectives Benson and Stabler trace the crime back to a city councilman's daughter. It is discovered that the girl had been connected to an abandoned newborn a year earlier, but she was never arrested.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Manipulated
programme.desc: When a stripper is found murdered in her apartment, the detectives learn she was also a successful attorney who kept her two lives separate. However, when a fellow stripper is found dead, the investigation uncovers a connection to the lawyer's boss.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gone
programme.desc: When a Montreal high school student vanishes while visiting New York City, three arrogant prep school teens become suspects. However, one of the suspects disappears and the judge has no choice but to dismiss the case due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Class
programme.desc: When a university student is murdered, the investigation uncovers that she was on financial aid but she had an unexplained influx of cash. Her wealthy roommate becomes a prime suspect when she is found in possession of the deceased girl's jewelry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waverly Hills, 9021-D'Oh
programme.desc: When Marge learns Springfield Elementary is the worst school in the state, she and Homer rent an apartment in an upscale neighbourhood so Bart and Lisa can attend a better school. To boost Lisa's popularity, Bart tells everyone she's friends with a star.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programme.desc: Springfield is in an uproar after Principal Skinner makes a sexist comment at the end of an Itchy and Scratchy musical. Principal Skinner is replaced by Melanie Upfoot, a women's education expert, who divides the school into two different schools.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mother Simpson
programme.desc: After faking his own death, Homer discovers that his mother is alive. He brings her home to meet the family and learns that she is on the run from the law. Her old nemesis, Mr. Burns, alerts the cops to her whereabouts, forcing her to leave once again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Heartbroke Kid
programme.desc: Bart's diet of processed foods leads to a massive weight gain and health issues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Copper Scroll
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the Nazi Code
programme.desc: Josh ventures into the former Third Reich in search of an elusive Nazi fortune hidden with a code allegedly created by Hitler's private secretary, and embedded into a piece of sheet music.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America
programme.desc: Josh traces the Vikings' westward expansion from the volcanic landscape of Iceland to a mysterious settlement in Greenland and into North America. He aims to find out if the Norse explorers landed in the United States.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Killer Views
programme.desc: A family of four build their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean on the eastern most point in the United States in Lubec, Maine. Later, a pro snowboarder and his wife prepare to move from their yurt in Whitefish to build their off-grid home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Dakota A-Frame
programme.desc: Jared 'Cappie' Capp showcases the luxury of off-grid living by building a modern home in the Black Hills of South Dakota. This stunning all-solar-powered abode will have a wood-burning fireplace, gourmet kitchen and a 400-square-foot loft.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: High and Dry
programme.desc: The Raneys build a cabin from scratch for amputee Jeff Tatsch and his wife Carol.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part One
programme.desc: The Raneys must build a dam and plan an entire cabin move to help the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two
programme.desc: Marty's dam is put to the test as the Raneys move an entire cabin into the flood zone. A surprise arrival of chicks has Misty needing an upgrade for her chicken coop. Matt crafts a knife blade in the Smiths' newly improved foundry.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Gina's Story
programme.desc: Gina and wife Beth live with Gina's mom but don't have her support. She and Gina's sister blame Beth for Gina's spiraling weight problem. Now it will take all Gina's will to leave home for Houston to get Dr. Now's help to save her life and her marriage.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Travis' Story
programme.desc: When Travis got too big to walk down the aisle, he promised to give his wife a proper wedding one day. Since then he's only gained weight. Now, Dr. Now is Travis' only hope to lose weight and get the life he and his wife dreamed of having together.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Travis' Story
programme.desc: When Travis got too big to walk down the aisle, he promised to give his wife a proper wedding one day. Since then he's only gained weight. Now, Dr. Now is Travis' only hope to lose weight and get the life he and his wife dreamed of having together.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Girl, Little Bus
programme.desc: Whitney invites Buddy on the road. The BGDC Pittsburgh class is overbooked in a cramped venue, jeopardizing the tour. Buddy's back pain flares up, threatening his sobriety. After a rough night, Buddy is missing and Whitney is forced to leave him behind.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Buddy's New Girl
programme.desc: Buddy goes missing in Columbus and Whitney threatens to cancel class. With the biggest city on the BGDC tour still looming, Whitney suspects sabotage when Todd messes up the choreography. Whitney is conflicted over meeting Buddy's new girlfriend.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: A Tale of Two Whitneys
programme.desc: Uncomfortable after her kiss with Buddy, Whitney creates a new business and a new life in Charlotte. When Whitney accepts a date with another man, it may create a love triangle. Plus, tension between Buddy and Tal forces Whitney into a tough decision.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Apple of His Eye
programme.desc: Missy brings her opinionated brothers to help her find the dress of her dreams. Back for her fitting, Donn longs for her brother's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Half-Ton Killer?
programme.desc: Topping 1,000 lbs., Mayra Rosales is accused of murdering her nephew. During the three-year trial, a nationwide debate erupted over whether or not an obese person can get away with murder.

programme.title: 900 Pound Man: The Race Against Time
programme.desc: At 900 lbs., Ricky is one of the world's largest men. Follow Ricky over three years as he struggles to find a surgeon willing to take on his case and a way off the island of Guam to get the potentially lifesaving surgery he desperately needs.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's My Junk
programme.desc: When Eileen admits a dark secret to her family, the situation quickly escalates beyond hoarding to a matter of life and death. Compulsive hoarder Dale has packed not one, but five houses full of clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Full of Rats
programme.desc: Property investors get more than they bargained for when the house they purchased is occupied by hoarder Michelle and a rat infestation so bad, it has compromised the building's foundation.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lee, Rena and Sarah
programme.desc: Lee's anger issues continue to jeopardize his relationship with Rena and threatens to derail both of their weight loss journeys, while a major life event sends Sarah into a depression, and she must pull herself out of if she wants to keep losing weight.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aubri and Brian
programme.desc: Nev and Slick Woods help 19-year-old Aubri find her Snapchat love, Brian, who says he lives at Aubri's college but has shady excuses not to meet. Nev and Slick hit campus in search of answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Falesha and Jacqueline
programme.desc: Falesha's name and pictures were stolen by a fake profile that nearly ruined her life. She thought her troubles were behind her, but four years later her past comes back to haunt her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mecca and Tanner
programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help 18-year-old Mecca connect with the boy she’s loved for the past five years. But when iO discovers that Mecca’s digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others, Mecca needs answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesus and Alexis
programme.desc: Nev and Kamie receive an anonymous email from a whistleblower reporting a catfishing! But when our hosts arrive to help the named victim, they uncover a deeper conspiracy of deception that only the secret informant can solve.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joseph and Sabrina
programme.desc: Joseph's been sending sexy Sabrina his love and his money but his sister doesn't buy Sabrina's lies and calls in Nev and Kamie for some truth. What they discover is so shocking that they wonder if Sabrina's lies will ever end.

programme.title: True Life Crime: Skipping School or Silenced Forever?
programme.desc: 16-year-old Mujey Dumbuya left her home to catch the bus for school and vanished. Despite her family reporting her missing, Mujey was classified as a runaway by authorities. Days later, her body was found in a wooded area 45 miles from her home.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXII
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel get outdoors with whisky camping, drive off on wrong waze, and age in the sun with premium leather.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLIV
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo talk about the most devious furniture known to man, 'traitor chairs', where all diseases get their start, with 'the plague begins', and they discuss the subtle art of 'funk tests'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ally Brooke
programme.desc: Ally Brooke joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to celebrate some minor miracles, found out how to identify 'tex wrecks' and experience no fear in 'amygdalessness.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling X
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel see some beauty destroyed in 'not in the face,' redheads get slammed in 'code red' and some distracted people meet their fate in 'obliviousness.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Amanda Cerny
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo welcome social media superstar Amanda Cerny to talk about "Bad Influencers," the "Dirt Angels," that some people call pigs, and the fitness confused, known as "Gymbeciles."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXVI
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo discuss whether some parents should put down their phone, advise us all to trust nobody and find out that all heroes wear capes.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: DJ Paul
programme.desc: Hip Hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to get a little Zap Happy, live Jugg Life and get energized by some beatspiration.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CL

programme.title: The First 48: Dark Waters
programme.desc: New Orleans Detective Ryan Vaught takes on his most challenging case yet when a young married couple goes missing and one of them is found floating in a river, drowned to death.

programme.title: Alaska PD: Taste of Blood
programme.desc: In Fairbanks, a wanted fugitive flees into the woods--and the police's only lead is frozen footprints in the snow. When a killer bear becomes loose in Kodiak, officers must hunt it down--before it kills again.

programme.title: Alaska PD: Arctic Survival
programme.desc: Three new officers have to adapt to the harsh realities of policing in Alaska. Officer Chris Cook questions his future in remote Kotzebue.

programme.title: Alaska PD: Love and Hate in Alaska
programme.desc: In Kotzebue, Sgt. Norman Hughes and Officer Robert Odom grapple with the distrust of the police as they try to keep the community safe. In Fairbanks, two officers bring a personal touch in dealing with alcohol and drug-fueled crime.

programme.title: The First 48: Jacked/ Fallen Idol
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is ambushed at a gas station, and Det. Steve David needs to track him down. Then in Miami, a beloved local rapper is gunned down at his car wash, and detectives suspect it was an inside job.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Italian Food Matter
programme.desc: Michael uncovers ancient secrets at an Asian gift shop, reveals a transformative spray at Eataly and leaves his assistant speechless at a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Industrial Asphalt Sealant
programme.desc: Michael trains his coworkers how to hold a dog who can't hold it. A man can vanish into a manhole, and maybe even a manhole can vanish itself.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr give a security presentation that’s anything but safe, then hold hands with strangers in the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: A passersby reaction to Sal burying his niece in the park, the rare outcome of a Joker vs. Joker challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Mother Hacker
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin test out a new toilet hack that will have you seeing in the dark, and Brooke has tips for hacking your dating profile. Plus, it's the shock of the season when Señor Solución finally meets his match, his mother-in-law.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack My Lawn
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke bring back a failed lawnmower hack to see if it will work. Plus, Kevin tests cheese cutting hacks for your next charcuterie and hack 911 takes on a murder mystery.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack on a Hot Tin Roof
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke test your hacks for smelly kitty litter, Kevin makes a flute out of a carrot in a new segment of 'let's make a thing,' and our hack line of defense will have a testy bridezilla walking down the aisle in no time.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Good Hack Hunting
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke test hacks for holding it in, and Nurse Hackie has the cure for itchy bites.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out

programme.title: I Was Prey: Fighting for Family
programme.desc: A triathlete is attacked by a bull shark while training in Alabama. After being bit by a rattlesnake, a father fights to survive. A couple is attacked by a giraffe on vacation in Zambia. And a girls' trip turns deadly in Cancun.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Dragged Below
programme.desc: Catherine Dwinnell is hiking in Alaska when she is struck from behind and attacked by a 1,000-pound moose.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Miles From Help
programme.desc: A taxidermist is elk hunting with his son-in-law in the Canadian Rocky Mountains when a grizzly bear charges. Then, a spear fisher is miles from shore, diving 180 feet below the surface when a bull shark races at him, jaws wide open.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Safari Horror
programme.desc: Bob Legasa and his friend are hunting in Montana. What he thinks is a bluff charge from a grizzly bear is, in fact, a near-lethal attack. While canoeing in Zimbabwe, Kristen Yaldor is thrown into the water and finds herself in the jaws of a hippopotamus.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Under Attack: Don't Mess With Danger
programme.desc: A man encounters a protective mother grizzly, while a woman's snorkeling expedition goes awry. Later, a gator strikes two brothers wading in the water, and a family's nightmare becomes reality when they awaken to an unkind visitor.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Backyard Bite
programme.desc: Outside Corpus Christi, Texas, Jeremy Sutcliffe is working in his garden when a rattlesnake bite puts him on the brink of death. While spearfishing in the Bahamas, Kent Bonde is blindsided by a bull shark that tears the calf muscle from his leg.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Invisible Assassin
programme.desc: Diver Tim Saxon is filming underwater at the Great Barrier Reef when an Irukandji jellyfish, one of the world's most venomous animals, stings him. Forester George Knoll is working in the remote Great Bear Rainforest when a grizzly bear attacks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Under Attack: Don't Mess With Danger
programme.desc: A man encounters a protective mother grizzly, while a woman's snorkeling expedition goes awry. Later, a gator strikes two brothers wading in the water, and a family's nightmare becomes reality when they awaken to an unkind visitor.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Invisible Assassin
programme.desc: Diver Tim Saxon is filming underwater at the Great Barrier Reef when an Irukandji jellyfish, one of the world's most venomous animals, stings him. Forester George Knoll is working in the remote Great Bear Rainforest when a grizzly bear attacks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Vacation Nightmare
programme.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs. And, during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face to face with a tiger shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Surviving for my Son
programme.desc: Wayne Petteway is attacked by an alligator while checking crab pots with his brother in North Carolina. In Arizona, Peter Baca is camping with his girlfriend and one-year-old son when he is awoken by something attacking him through the walls of the tent.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Deep: Sea Snakes
programme.desc: Sea snakes are some of the most venomous snakes in the world. Steve dives into their underwater habitat to show how placid and tolerant these reptiles can be when unprovoked.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Roly-Poly Puppies
programme.desc: A shy puppy comes out of her shell with the help of her siblings. A trio of St. Bernard puppies follow their noses to big adventures. Also, an Airedale Terrier names Merlin tries to disappear from her eight brothers and sisters.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Scout is so afraid of its tormentor, Caramel, that he literally lives inside a kitchen cabinet; A woman who adopted a hybrid Bengal cat who can use the toilet but can't keep otherwise keep still.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Nalla Fights Back
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff races to save a brave pit bull shot defending her owner during a robbery. Dr. Baier treats a guinea pig with an unusual problem. And Jeff and Hector head out to a wildlife sanctuary that needs their help with a couple of wolves.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Not So Easy Riders
programme.desc: A health scare puts the brakes on Dr. Blue's dreams of motorcycle riding with his brother. Dr. Ross treats a sweet bearded dragon who is laying bad eggs, while Dr. Lavigne is challenged with what to do about a large tumor taking over a Boxer's toe.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi Says Yes!
programme.desc: As Bindi celebrates her 21st birthday, she gets a surprise proposal from her boyfriend, Chandler. Meanwhile, things get dangerous as Robert wrangles gators in thick mud. Terri helps with the momentous birth of a baby white rhino.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Giraffe Moving Day
programme.desc: Giraffe Kidepo is off to a new zoo but transporting a giraffe is no easy task. His younger brother Narus is proving a disruptive influence and as the keepers wrestle with the challenges thrown up by the move, Narus doesn't make things any easier.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens
programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The One
programme.desc: Tia and her staff scramble to coax a scared dog, hiding under a vehicle, to safety. Tania's in-laws are seeking a new addition to their home. Tia's son Moe and his fiancée Lizzy prepare for their wedding day.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Behind Bars
programme.desc: Tia enlists Matt's help adopting a patrol dog out to his former home, Dixon prison. Then, Tia gets a call about two dogs left behind when their owners abandoned the property. And, Tania has trouble letting go when Brandi is up for adoption.

programme.title: Movie: Daddy's Little Girls

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Ultimate Champions Edition
programme.desc: Five former champions return for a gruelling test of skill that begins even before the first forge is ignited. Qualifying only amps up the intensity, which reaches a boiling point in the finals, where the two remaining smiths must forge the Tai Chi sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Gladiator's Scissor

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kpinga

programme.desc: In a twist of fate, four smiths must forge a Damascus blade. After two rounds the last two smiths standing must return home and recreate the Darb Sri Gun Chai, a double handed Thai battle sword. Then, contestants try to recreate the Zulu War Axe.

programme.title: Vikings: The Best Laid Plans
