programme.title: Pawn Stars: Finding Fonzie
programme.desc: The guys find an original poem handwritten by Marilyn Monroe and a hybrid rocket engine built into a suitcase. When Rick's autographed Henry Winkler photo goes missing, he goes to great lengths to bring Fonzie home.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Magic Bus
programme.desc: Head back in time with the Pawn Stars when Rick checks out a fully restored 1960s VW Samba.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rock Stars and Race Cars
programme.desc: A self-portrait from Rolling Stones guitarist Ron Wood makes its way into the shop. Then, Rick gets nostalgic when a stack of love letters handwritten by Mickey Rooney are mailed in. Later, Rick toys with the idea of buying slot cars from his childhood.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Van Gogh a Go Go
programme.desc: A customer brings in lithographs that are believed to have belonged to Vincent van Gogh. Then, Corey and Chumlee are brought back to their younger days when a vintage skateboard collection comes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick the Giant
programme.desc: The shop checks out some posters by artist Shepard Fairey, the artist behind the famous Obama posters. Corey and Chumlee look at the possibility of getting a Mork figurine. Later, Rick and Chum evaluate their friendship.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sword Play
programme.desc: Rick checks out a Willys Wagon from 1951 and a pair of 19th Century European swords.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Locked Up and Rail Roaded
programme.desc: A 1950s Chrysler Town and Country Newport; a cubist painting by New Zealand artist Louise Henderson; antique railroad locks from the 1800s; an early-1900s self-heating gasoline iron.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Killer Pawn
programme.desc: A signed shower curtain by Anthony Perkins; an 1882 Gold Certificate and 1918 Federal Reserve note; an 1800s Millionaire Calculator; a 1950s Russian night vision scope.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Declaration of Dopeness
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out a Civil War era carbine that has a surprise 'coffee grinder' in the shoulder stock. Rick contemplates if the unique item is worth a deal. Later on, a vintage skateboard deck makes an appearance in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Buddy, Can You Spare a Thousand?
programme.desc: Rick might pay 10 times the face value of a rare $1,000 star note. He later pursues the purchase of a World War II Navy gun scope. Chumlee investigates the mysterious legacy of an ancient bronze statue. Rick and Corey check out an iconic storyboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned and Confused
programme.desc: A seller brings his Led Zeppelin vinyl collection to Rick and Chum. A fancy 19th century office desk may be a worthwhile buy. A game-used base from the 2016 World Series could be a home run for the guys. Rick takes a trip to see 'The Object.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ultimate Fighting Pawn
programme.desc: An antique high wheel bike captivates Rick. Chum sells one of Rick's beloved Japanese katanas to UFC President Dana White. Rick heads out to look at a beautifully-restored grand piano from the 1800s. An original Walkman cassette player stops by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Boats and Bros
programme.desc: As Rick and Chum continue their adventures in Michigan, Rick gambles on a WWI helmet and a RC Cola machine. Back at the shop, Corey deals with a 'Rocky III' statue.

programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Life After Midnight
programme.desc: In February 2015, the body of 26-year-old Celina Petersen is found dumped in an alley in South Park, Seattle. When police recover surveillance footage from across the neighborhood, they begin to unravel the shocking truth behind her murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Savage Soldier
programme.desc: John Walsh profiles John Blauvelt, a troubled U.S. Army vet who is accused of waging a lethal war against his young wife. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Rudy Fernandez, whose teen romance with his high school sweetheart is believed to have turned deadly.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: A Personal Mission
programme.desc: When a double shooting leaves one woman dead and another clinging to life, John joins police on the trail of fugitive Lenell Kirby. Callahan takes on the mysterious murder of a dear Walsh family friend, Lindsay Harris.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Savage Soldier
programme.desc: John Walsh profiles John Blauvelt, a troubled U.S. Army vet who is accused of waging a lethal war against his young wife. Later, Callahan Walsh looks at Rudy Fernandez, whose teen romance with his high school sweetheart is believed to have turned deadly.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Dark Water
programme.desc: After 53-year-old Barbara Hefner disappears from her remote Georgia residence, her body is found floating in nearby Folly Lake. On the hunt for her killer, officers uncover a recent inheritance and secret affair before ultimately bringing justice home.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Double-Crossed
programme.desc: When the body of 20-year-old transgender female CeCe Dove is found floating in a suburban pond 20 miles from her Cleveland home, detectives consider motives personal and primal as they hunt down her ruthless killer.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep
programme.desc: 23-year-old Sherry Leighty disappears from Altoona, PA, leaving her three small children behind. After a 13 year search her sister discovers the rumor she skipped town with a new boyfriend is a lie and people close to Sherry have been hiding a secret.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: A missing cheerleader. A seemingly unrelated roadside fire. As two cases converge, police juggle numerous suspects and motives, until a cryptic surveillance video brings the investigation to a shocking conclusion of betrayal, devotion, and murder.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Wife's Double Life
programme.desc: When a young husband is thrown in jail for the murder of his newlywed wife, most people in their small Oklahoma community believed the case was solved. But odd cell tower records and surprising DNA evidence force investigators to take a second look.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Tattooed in Memory
programme.desc: Kidnapped just steps from her home, a 15-year-old girl is brutally assaulted and left for dead in Denver's South Platte River.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: The Sound of Terror
programme.desc: In 1983, the Secret Service are on the trail of a counterfeiter. In a storage unit, they find sickening audio recordings of him torturing dozens of women. Analyzing the tapes, they realize that he may be one of the most depraved serial killers in history.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Sex, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: A mom accused of the murder of a stranger must clear her name by secretly-recording a confession from the man she claims is framing her. Sordid revelations of a secret life lead police to prove the guilt of an obsessive, cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Whispers from the Dead
programme.desc: In Little Falls, Minn., a retiree's peace is shattered by a home break-in, culminating in a gruesome double-homicide. Investigators discover audio recordings of the killings, revealing what really happened and the killer's true motives.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Suburban House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael figure out the open-concept dilemma at the Suburban House and turn their attention outside, where their plans for a spacious new deck come up short. They must quickly find a solution before the fast-approaching open house arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Master Suite Makeover
programme.desc: Wes Borland and Carre Callaway explore the run-down Detroit mansion they purchased sight unseen. The amount of work they need to do to this house is overwhelming. They start off their renovations with the master suite.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Open Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen was originally designed as a place for servants to work and eat, but Wes and Carre remodel it to make it functional for modern-day use.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Hidden Room
programme.desc: There are 3 living areas in the house that need to be more functional: the living room, a sunroom and a library. The living room gets a fresh look while the sunroom becomes an art studio. The library is turned into a speakeasy hidden behind a bookshelf.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Guest Apartment
programme.desc: Two bedrooms and a bathroom originally used to house servants are converted into a cozy guest apartment where visiting family and band members can relax and spend the weekend.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Basement Recording Studio
programme.desc: Wes and Carre want to create a recording studio in their basement that can be used by their band and other visiting bands. They build custom shelving to house their guitars and pedals and build an art deco bar complete with vintage bar stools.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: The exterior of the Detroit mansion has become run-down. In addition to replacing the landscaping and creating planter beds for an herb garden, they build an entertainment area complete with a pergola and a firepit.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Bullinger Job
programme.desc: A couple renovates a bedroom to add much needed space to their cramped house, bursting at the seams with four kids.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Fowler Job
programme.desc: Reece and Stephanie gut their kitchen then work together to replace the cabinets, the countertops, the flooring and even put in new appliances.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Payne Job
programme.desc: Barrett Payne and his friend Ben Haught tear down Barrett's old staircase and try to build a new, floating, metal one. They hit a few bumps along the way, but end up with a great final product.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Malinowski Job
programme.desc: DJ and Molly Malinowski bought a charming home as a young couple, but three kids later, they've run out of space. DJ and Molly want to convert their unused attic into a playroom for their kids.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Erickson Job
programme.desc: Tracey Erickson and her friend Dannie Moore renovate her kitchen area. By removing a small half bathroom and demolishing a wall that divides the kitchen from the staircase, they hope to make an open gallery space.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Miles Job
programme.desc: Amanda and Blake are planning their first renovation together. Their vision is to create a backyard oasis perfect for summertime entertaining with friends and family.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Besties on a Budget
programme.desc: Two best friends flipping a house in Amherst, NY, struggle to complete renovation projects themselves due to lack of experience. Failed project after failed project leaves one looing to the pros.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flip-Cation
programme.desc: A West Coast couple attempts a four-week flip while on vacation. As the end of the trip approaches, he wants to find contractors to finish the house when they're back home. She worries that they won't find anyone who can see her vision through to the end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipped Out Friends
programme.desc: Two real estate agent best friends flip their first home in Tacoma, WA, with hopes that their insider knowledge of what sells will pull them through. However, with no prior renovation experience, they put their friendship, flip and safety on the line.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Two friends and stay-at-home moms decide to flip their first house together in New Orleans, Louisiana, but their conflicting design styles and schedule test the limits of their friendship. They'll have to find a way to compromise to finish on time.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: In the Trenches
programme.desc: A husband-and-wife team goes way over on schedule and budget when permit applications with the city don't go as expected. Finding themselves at a standstill with what work they can accomplish, the wife starts to worry this flip will never end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Lonely Star State Flip
programme.desc: A young couple finds themselves in deep water on a flip in Pecan Grove, Texas. While he works on an oil rig for two weeks at a time, she struggles to find projects she can take on alone while she cares for their baby. The stress of their open house is on!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nutty
programme.desc: Giada, Tyler, Sunny, Wolfgang and Duff are going crazy for nuts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: At a Deli
programme.desc: Food Network stars list their favourites from a deli, including brisket and corned beef.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Under Wraps
programme.desc: The Food Network stars discuss their favourite food that is wrapped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Cake Walk
programme.desc: Food Network hosts share their favourite cakes, including chocolate and red velvet.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Juicy, Crunchy and Tangy
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Lexington, Ky. for a plump pork burger and ingenious smoked chicken wings smothered in a blackberry jalapeno sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Whole Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Michael Symon's in Nashville, where a killer new burger joint encourages you to construct your own custom creations. Then, he hits the heart of Cleveland where a newcomer pushes the boundaries of pub food and house-made brews.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Antigua Guatemala
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the vibrant and flavorful fusions of Antigua Guatemala. This locale is home to sacred food traditions and cultural mashups of Mayan and Spanish heritage. His adventure includes colorful enchiladas, tiny tamales and traditional sweets.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Door County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern scopes out the down-to-earth culinary traditions of scenic Door County, Wisconsin. Fresh fish from Lake Michigan and local produce defines the Nordic-influenced cuisine of this vacation getaway for nature lovers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Nashville, Tenn., for hickory-smoked baby back ribs with hot, Memphis-style barbecue sauce from the Smoke Et Al food truck and owner Shane Autrey.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: All-Day Brunch/ Jerk Chicken/ Cupcakes
programme.desc: Brad Miller starts out at Nashville's Sucker Brunch truck, where Chef Michael Gilbert's celebration of breakfast comes in a grits dish topped with smoked Andouille sausage, caramelized onions and spinach.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Burritos, Kabobs and S'Mores
programme.desc: In St. Louis, Brad Miller visits the Seoul Taco truck, where Chef David Choi is serving up a unique spin on Mexican food by infusing it with the flavours of Korea. Brad samples a gogi bowl and the popular Korean barbecue burrito with kimchi rice.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Ribs, Ramen and Gooey Butter Cake
programme.desc: Brad Miller's food truck trek starts at Wood Shop BBQ in Seattle, where Chef Matt Davis serves up massive smoked beef ribs and chicken wings tossed in his special Kansas City-style barbecue sauce. Next up is the Hapa PDX truck in Portland, Ore.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Foods in Jamaica
programme.desc: The search for fire and food takes us to Jamaica where we make a beeline for Scotchies's Too, a restaurant famous for cooking jerk pork and chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: Undercover Veggies
programme.desc: To tempt his niece into eating her vegetables, Alton sneaks them into several meals.

programme.title: Good Eats: It's a Pan, It's a Dish, It's Paella
programme.desc: Alton Brown demystifies the Spanish pan and the rice dish for which it is famous.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet Of The Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.desc: Freddy and Pip rush to deliver Valentines to the babies they've delivered to make it back in time for the Valentine's Day Party; Freddy, Pip and K.C. try to get a shy turtle out of her shell.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Papa Pluto / Happy Valentine Helpers
programme.desc: Pluto finds a fallen bird's nest with three hatching eggs and becomes the baby birds' protector! It's Valentine's Day and the Happy Helpers roll out their Do-It-Yourself trailer!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Biggest Heist Ever/ Thrillin' Hilda!
programme.desc: After Von Drake invents a truck to carry all the Roadsters, Commander Heist steals it. Hilda asks the Happy Helpers to help her find a new sport to play.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Speak Up Gekko/ Catboy and Master Fang's Stolen Sword
programme.desc: Romeo steals Gekko’s voice, but Gekko’s not sure he wants it back before his poetry presentation. Night Ninja has stolen Master Fang’s prized sword.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko and the Super Ninjalinos / Owlette's Terrible Pterodactyl Trouble
programme.desc: Night Ninja steals all the sports equipment from Sports Day for his Ninjalinos. Romeo takes a pterodactyl model from the Dinosaur Exhibit and turns it into a flying robot!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Blanket Fort/ Playground Pirates
programme.desc: Summer and Piggy surprise their friends by building a blanket fort so large that it becomes a blanket kingdom. When Miss Nanny loses her earring, the Muppet Babies use their imaginations to turn into pirates and follow a treasure map to find it.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Grandpa Camp / A Backyard Divided
programme.desc: It's grandparent's day and since Fozzie has never met his grandparents, Kermit finds two people to fill in for him, Statler and Waldorf. Later, when Gonzo and Piggy can't seem to get along, they divide the backyard into two separate kingdoms.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO
programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Comet / Glowy Moths
programme.desc: PJ Robot persuades the PJ Masks to journey towards a comet. He thinks it’ll give HQ extra power. Luna’s teasing Romeo with her newly super-charged moths and the PJ Masks have to stop her.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Clumsy Catboy/ Gekko and the Mighty Moon Problem
programme.desc: Romeo plans to use his newest device to make everyone in the world so clumsy that they can’t stop him. Romeo creates a space laser to carve his face into the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Job
programme.desc: Turns out that house sitting for the Giant's farm turns out to be a disaster for Mickey.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Message From Mars
programme.desc: Mickey, Goofy, Daisy and Pluto take their Rocket Ship to mars where they help Martian Mickey and his dog Pluto find a Martian Treasure in time for their Twilight Celebration.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Animal Cleans Up/ Best Pals Pizza Parlor Palace
programme.desc: After smelling Animal's stinky feet, the gang opens a car wash to help him clean them. Fozzie and Kermit can't agree on how to run the Best Pals Pizza Parlor Palace.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Run Fozzie Run/My Brother Vinny
programme.desc: Fozzie runs away after he accidentally breaks the swing. Rizzo is feeling a little insecure when his superstar singer big brother arrives at the playroom for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ready, Get Pet ... Go PLUTO!/ Figaro's New Friend!
programme.desc: When pets are allowed to join their owners on a race, Pluto and Pete's dog Butch try to upstage each other. The Happy Helpers look after Pluto, and Figaro gets jealous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Comet
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are excitedly anticipating the arrival of Mickey's Comet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto Lends a Paw
programme.desc: When Minnie's kitty, Figaro, wanders off because he feels ignored, Pluto the Rescue Dog saves the day by finding the missing pet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Golden Boo-Boo
programme.desc: The Clubhouse pals go on an adventure, in a search for the legendary Golden-Boo-Boo statue.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey Goes Fishing
programme.desc: Goofy drops off his kitten, Mr. Pettibone, at the Clubhouse to Mickey for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Birthday
programme.desc: Minnie along with all of her friends celebrate her birthday, surprises are to be expected.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Fancy Dancin' Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy is taught how to act like a gentleman when Clarabelle asks him to go to the Dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Bird
programme.desc: Goofy finds a lost bird and Mickey helps him bring it back home to his mom in the forest.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: A Surprise for Minnie
programme.desc: Mickey enlists our help in making and delivering a special card for Minnie.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Ball
programme.desc: Pluto loses his favourite ball when he's outside playing with it and bounces it too high.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Agent Double-O-Goof/ Egg-xasperating!
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the Queen of England to come for tea, Goofy is mistaken for a secret agent in charge of delivering a top-secret briefcase. The Happy Helpers are charged with watching Clara Cluck's egg while she runs errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hot Dog Daze Afternoon/ Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: On Mickey's day off, he continues getting called back to help at the garage. The Happy Helpers look after Mrs. Sweetums' candy store and factory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Grand Food Truck Rally/ Cuckoo La-La
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals race in a grand food truck rally in Paris. While in Paris, the happy helpers help famous fashion designer Cuckoo La-La with a fashion show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daredevil Goofy!/ The Big Broadcast
programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hi, Jinx!/ Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?
programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Biggest Hero / Think Quick
programme.desc: Rocky gets jealous when Tiny suddenly becomes the go-to hero! Mazu may be a slow runner but is a quick thinker.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Seeing Stars/ A Tiny Triumph
programme.desc: Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny’s artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Garage Alone/ Camp Happy Helpers
programme.desc: When a thief is on the loose, Goofy and Pluto try to protect the garage. The Happy Helpers fill in as counselors for the day at a summer camp.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Goofy Race! / Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks!
programme.desc: Goofy designs the first ever Goofy Race! When Cuckoo Loca's cuckoo clock is broken, Minnie and Daisy decide to get her a new one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Teacher Goes Ninja/ Robot Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Night Ninja kidnaps the kids' teacher; the PJs try to fix a damaged Robot.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Wolfies Take HQ / The Good Wolfy
programme.desc: The Wolfies get into the HQ and transform it into their den! While the Wolfies run amok, Gekko doubts he has what it takes to be good while Kevin isn't sure he wants to be mean.

programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.desc: Poof is trying to shapeshift, but he unfortunately takes after Cosmo!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Dinkelberg/ Spellementary School

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongicus/ Suction Cup Symphony
programme.desc: Plankton builds a Roman coliseum, and puts on a free gladiator show featuring togas, chariots, and ferocious lionfish. / Squidward is determined to win the Bikini Bottom Symphony's composition contest, but SpongeBob and Patrick keep distracting him.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Norville vs. Ward

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Adolescents Anonymous/ Minor Games
programme.desc: Cost of recovery program for teen; video game trade between teens.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: My Bestie Is Stalkin' You
programme.desc: Reggie says his friend Monique's boyfriend is cheating on her, and he wants to help.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-husband, claiming while they were married, he was an abusive cheater who made sex tapes with multiple woman in their bed. She filed a restraining order against him after he assaulted her, and she’s suing for breach of contract.

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: You Lawn to Me
programme.desc: A woman claims her landscaper was negligent.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: The plaintiff says he ex-wife purposely left him an unpaid propane bill out of revenge. Then, the plaintiff is suing for $5000 in damages to her car; the defendant says he did get into a car accident but it wasn’t with the plaintiff’s vehicle.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Desperate Young Dads Need DNA Tests
programme.desc: After learning that Lakeiya cheated on him while she was seven-months pregnant with their first child, Avery questions whether their second child is his. Plus, Drew questions if he is really the father of Hunter's child.

programme.title: Maury: DNA Will Prove My Baby Is You 16th Child!
programme.desc: Tony thinks Ashley is cheating out of revenge and that she was in a porno. Maria had a fling with Daran and got pregnant only to find Daran already had 15 kids with seven women. Lisa thought she found the son she gave up, but now fears she's being conned.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Red Hot Strippers
programme.desc: After getting fired from his job, Kody went to a strip club to blow off some steam. A lap dance led him down the forbidden path of cheating on his girlfriend Nicole.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Movie: Big
programme.desc: A boy awakens as a full-grown man but is not ready to face the adult world.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Hope Floats
programme.desc: A woman returns to her hometown after discovering her husband was having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: The Hudsucker Proxy
programme.desc: A naïve Indiana boy goes to New York in 1958 to sell his idea for the hula hoop.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has the challenge of reuniting a boy with his father while in Cannes.

programme.title: Movie: Aquamarine
programme.desc: A mermaid flees her controlling father and ends up ashore where two girls, hoping to be granted a wish, decide to help her with a romantic conundrum.

programme.title: Movie: Son in Law
programme.desc: A girl comes home from college for Thanksgiving. She surprises her parents by bringing her new fiance with her.

programme.desc: A child psychiatrist panics when his girlfriend announces that she is pregnant.

programme.desc: Bow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante and learns she is suffering from postpartum depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side while she works through it.

programme.title: Riverdale: Chapter Sixty-Nine: Men of Honor
programme.desc: Archie grows concerned for Frank when someone from his past arrives in Riverdale. Betty and Alice land on a collision course with their number one suspect. Jughead challenges Bret to a duel to settle their grievances. Veronica catches up with a friend.

programme.title: Nancy Drew: The Whispter Box
programme.desc: When Nancy finds herself stuck in an alternate reality, the crew must find a way to bring her back.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel is excited about her interview for a position with a famous clothing designer.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Robbery
programme.desc: When Jerry's apartment gets broken into, George persuades him to look at a new apartment.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Samuel Gets Fired
programme.desc: When Samuel loses his job and his apartment, Mike offers to let him stay at his place with interesting results.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Salmon Under My Sweater
programme.desc: While Jake helps Charlie write a cartoon theme song, things heat up between Alan and Rose.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Kara-te Kid
programme.desc: Inspired by the 'Karate Kid' films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg face off in a karate match to settle once and for all a long-running feud. Barry and Adam go to Uncle Marvin for training, but the only thing they learn is how to clean an apartment.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Circle of Driving
programme.desc: Hoping to receive a car for his birthday, Barry is shocked by what his mother gives him; Adam asks Pop for advice.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the No New Friends
programme.desc: When Max reconnects with an old friend, Caroline's jealousy inspires her to try to make some new friends of her own.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Help Wanted

programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.desc: A woman seeks the reimbursement of items given to her nephew to aid his recovery.

programme.desc: The Plaintiff was friends with the Defendant and claims she was a drug abuser. He says he loaned her $350, but she failed to repay him, so he’s suing. She says he offered her money for sex and assaulted her when she refused.

programme.desc: Woman sues for reimbursement of medication fees; woman sues for cost of caregiver for son.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A plaintiff is suing over an unfinished bathroom remodelling job. Then, an ex-employee is sued for an unpaid loan; he says his ex-boss took money out of his paycheck.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Saw the Screenshots of Your Sex Video
programme.desc: Ricco looked through his girlfriend Ashley's phone and found a photo of her having sex with another men, and he wants to know when it was taken. Plus, Gino is suspected of receiving sexual messages and videos from other men and women.

programme.title: Maury: Is My Man Having an Affair With My Teen Sister?
programme.desc: Mary came home to her man Taji in their bedroom with Mary's sister Jekera. Trina and David are back to see if David is cheating on Trina. Keyaira forgave Deamos for cheating, but now believes he's cheating and that her 60-year-old friend is helping him.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: First Time Sexsperience
programme.desc: Ryan says it’s always better to get even than to get played! He wants to confess to his girlfriend Caitlin that he cheated on her with his friend Lucy.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle All the Way
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a father is searching all over town for a toy for his son. While his son is at home wondering where he is, the neighbour is hitting on his wife.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Daze
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, a man is convinced he'll never fall in love again. His best friend dares him to propose to a waitress. The dare evolves into the kind of love that both have been looking for all along.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.desc: Two buddies win a vacation and get involved with a con who ripped off his ex-wives.

programme.title: Movie: American Animals

programme.desc: When the Clampett family strikes oil in the Ozark swamps, they move to Beverly Hills.
